Read a GraphReFly node as a Svelte readable store.

## Import

```ts
import { nodeReadable } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/svelte";
```

## Signature

```ts
function nodeReadable(node: Node<T>): Readable<T | undefined>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `node` | `Node<T>` | Node to observe, adapt, or connect. |

## Returns

A `Readable<T | undefined>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { nodeReadable } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/svelte";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/svelte.ts`
